response.justification: Candidate has strong TypeScript/Node.js experience, recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, and prior exposure to high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no evidence of Python — a must-have skill — and limited demonstration of staff-level technical strategy, stakeholder coordination, or formal on-call/incident response. Worth a screening conversation to verify Python depth and staff-scope responsibilities before committing.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus founder ownership of a production platform
concerns: No Python listed in skills or employment history despite it being a must-have
Career gap since October 2025 and short (6-month) tenure in most recent Staff role
Limited explicit evidence of staff-level technical strategy and cross-functional stakeholder management
